Short CV

Bahşende Çoban Azizoğlu started her undergraduate education in 2012 at Kocaeli University, Faculty of Communication, Department of Public Relations and Advertising. In 2013, she started her double major in the Department of Visual Communication Design at Kocaeli University, Faculty of Communication. In the fall semester of 2016, she continued her education at Vilnius University, where she went with the Erasmus exchange program. She successfully graduated from both departments in 2016. In 2017, she started her master's degree in Visual Communication and Advertising at Kocaeli University, Institute of Social Sciences. After completing her master's degree, she was accepted to the Ph.D. program in Public Relations at Marmara University in 2019, and successfully completed her doctoral studies in 2024. She currently works as a Ph.D. research assistant at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Communication, Department of Advertising. Her research interests include social media, sustainability communication and branding.
